subcodes.first_line: O thou servant who art in harmony with the Abhá Beauty! Hearken unto this call, which is the essence of reward on the Day of Return, amidst the concourse of all creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده موافق جمال ابهی باین خطاب که جوهر ثواب در یوم ایابست در بین ملا اکوان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
